summary: 現行 HEAD e0a38eb3c62a の Gate Evidence は、Story、Architecture、Final Spec 17 clauses、実装、focused contract/process replay、current-head verification evidence の間で整合している。旧 3 finding は解消済みであり、deadline は advisory_only、post_pr_ready monitoring は out_of_scope、PR lifecycle/runtime cost/managed-worktree は inherited_regression_only として限定され、Story #1 の新規所有 claim には使われていない。

inspection.summary: review request の bounded inputs を先に読み、旧 finding の resolution evidence、AC-1..AC-10 の具体的 test binding、Final Spec clauses、実装の authority/lifecycle/CLI surface の順に確認した。request 内の reuse snapshot は unit evidence 更新直前のため stale だったが、現在の verification-evidence.json と参照 artifact はすべて現行 HEAD に直接照合した。

commands.observed: 3 outer tests passed, 0 failed; acceptance replay required and observed 47 nested focused contract/process tests passed, 0 failed

finding_dispositions.resolution: The current E2E record no longer relies on adjacent tests. A real temporary Git repository invokes bin/vibepro.js in fresh Node processes and replays run/status/watch/resume/cancel plus source_fallback state. The acceptance wrapper then binds AC-1..AC-10 to explicit passing focused test names.

Responsibility evidence now names exact inherited regression bundles only: PR lifecycle 4 tests, runtime-cost telemetry ingestion 22 tests, and managed-worktree execution locality 12 tests. The artifact explicitly sets responsibility_scope=inherited_regression_only and story1_ownership_claim=false.

Deadline is a validated and persisted advisory field only; automatic deadline expiry is not claimed. pr_ready means Gate DAG readiness and post_pr_ready degradation monitoring is explicitly outside this Story. Direct focused tests verify exact advisory defaults, nullable deadline validation, closed lifecycle behavior, and Gate-readiness-only positive pr_ready transition.

test_anchors: repository Run persists exact defaults, resumes advisory budget, and repeated cancel is byte-stable
repository CLI survives fresh processes and repair is non-mutating
nullable state unions reject canonical and predecessor values without mutation
recoverable transitions require a fresh typed stop reason without mutation
preferred source-fallback Run resumes from its canonical artifact in fresh CLI processes
source fallback survives restart paths and rejects repair without mutation, but pre-existing unavailable fails closed
lifecycle matrix accepts only the closed transition set
guarded Run survives fresh CLI processes and replays its canonical artifact
resume fails closed on a stale authoritative HEAD without mutating the Run
resume from another worktree fails closed without mutating either artifact
unknown persisted status and transition target fail closed without mutation
CLI success JSON equals persisted Run and legacy status without run-id stays on the legacy route
execute help advertises guarded commands without removing legacy commands
migration changes schema only, corrupt state is quarantined, and future schema is preserved
guarded Run survives fresh CLI processes and replays its canonical artifact
implicit Run selection fails closed when any candidate is rejected
source and managed callers use the same Story creation lock
human errors expose linked-copy recovery handles and exact repair command
strict ids fail before path composition and CLI emits typed exit-2 JSON
migration changes schema only, corrupt state is quarantined, and future schema is preserved
Gate readiness is the only positive pr_ready transition
existing mutation commits once across mirror failure and explicit repair
concurrent linked worktrees share the bootstrap lock before legacy authority exists
separate Git directories keep bootstrap locks repository-scoped
partial legacy bootstrap stops Run creation, releases the lock, and makes the next attempt fail closed

regression_guard.detail: The full-suite evidence is honestly qualified as composite_not_single_head: 1138/1138 completed while HEAD advanced from 6cb1101 to e0a38eb. The current-head delta is limited to src/cli.js, src/guarded-run-session.js, and test/guarded-run-session.test.js and is covered by current-head focused unit/runtime-cost (67/67), fresh-process E2E replay (3/3 outer, 47/47 nested), and exact inherited responsibility bundles (38/38). No single-head full-suite claim is made.

path_surface_coverage.detail: Coverage reaches repository, managed, and source_fallback authority; canonical source/managed/symlink control roots; explicit and implicit Run selection; corrupt/future/predecessor state; stale HEAD and other-worktree rejection; common-dir creation locks and repository isolation; partial bootstrap; authority-first mirror failure and explicit repair; human/JSON/help CLI surfaces; and legacy execute compatibility. Rejected candidates and recovery handles remain typed and visible rather than silently suppressed.

judgment_delta: E2E binding changed from indirect adjacent-suite evidence to real fresh-process CLI replay plus explicit AC-1..AC-10 name bindings, resolving the prior overclaim.
Responsibility evidence changed from broad labels to exact current-head bundles and explicitly disclaims Story #1 ownership, resolving the contract mismatch.

Failure-mode claims changed from possible implied deadline/post-pr_ready behavior to the actual persistence-only boundary: advisory deadline and no post-pr_ready monitoring; focused tests directly establish the remaining claimed behavior.

The request's evidence-reuse snapshot reported stale unit evidence because verification was updated after request generation. Direct inspection of the newer current-head artifacts supersedes that snapshot for this review.
The full-suite record is accepted only as qualified regression background, not as a single-head proof. Current HEAD proof comes from the delta-focused unit, E2E, and inherited responsibility bundles.
overall_readiness_note: This pass is limited to the gate_evidence role. It does not assert that pr-prepare is globally ready; current-head adjudication and any other coordinator-owned review lifecycle blockers must still be regenerated or closed separately.
